content: FastAPI async endpoints: use async def + await for Cognee calls since Cognee SDK is async-native. For cognify() which can be slow (LLM extraction), use BackgroundTasks to return 202 Accepted immediately and process async. Pattern: @app.post('/remember') async def remember(bg: BackgroundTasks): bg.add_task(run_remember, data); return {status: processing}. Router organization: split into routers/memory.py (remember, recall, feedback), routers/lifecycle.py (forget, release, reset). Use pydantic models for request/response shapes. CORS needed since Next.js origin differs.
